title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Reliance Retail

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Reliance Retail
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail:
Reliance Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail!
